name: Fieldhouse Golf Simulator
about: Community Fieldhouse is a multi-sport facility offering a range of activities, including golf simulator access alongside other sports like volleyball, basketball, soccer, and pickleball. The facility features various indoor and outdoor courts, turf fields, and simulators available for rent. Golfers can access a high-end multi-sports simulator that provides numerous features and games suitable for all ages. Pricing is based on hourly rental, with options for individual courts, fields, or simulator time, as well as unlimited play memberships for frequent users.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end multi-sports simulator with numerous top courses and games for all ages
Includes features like driving range, miniature golf, and Angry Golf game mode
Air-conditioned environment for comfortable play year-round
Golf instructors are welcome for private lessons
Available for rent by the half hour with flexible scheduling options

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with a variety of dining options available on-site.
Full bar service available, serving alcoholic beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end multi-sports simulator with capabilities for various sports including golf, baseball, football, and more.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: We have some clubs available, but it's recommended to bring your own set if you have them.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the facility offers a full-service restaurant and bar with a variety of dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the game mode and number of players. The simulator features various games, including standard golf and miniature golf, which can affect duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children are welcome. Children under 5 must have a parent/guardian with them at all times while playing on courts, turf, or in simulators. Child wristbands are required for entry.
